Description: Implement redraft league-season lifecycle with archive and reset semantics.
Add versioned league settings snapshots and immutable historical rule references.
Block keeper and dynasty carryover fields in redraft mode across API and validation layers.
Create base schema for leagues, seasons, settings, teams, and memberships.
Implement sport profile registry for NFL, NBA, MLB, NHL, NCAAB, NCAAF, and Soccer.
Enforce commissioner, manager, and viewer permission model on league mutations.
Add mutation audit logging with actor, timestamp, and trace id metadata.
Add CI checks for migration forward/rollback and schema drift protection.
